orbitx.Matchups

Contents

  • Matchups
    • Matchups.__init__()

orbitx.Matchups#

class orbitx.Matchups(satellites: List[str], start_date: datetime64, end_date: datetime64, time_diff_threshold: timedelta64, space_diff_threshold: timedelta64, orbit: Orbit, matchups: Dict[str, Dict[str, ndarray[tuple[Any, ...], dtype[_ScalarT]]]], check_before: bool | None = False, check_after: bool | None = False, has_land_ocean_mask: bool = False, reference_date: datetime64 = np.datetime64('1970-01-01T00:00:00'))[source]#

Class to find matchup events between multiple satellites

__init__(satellites: List[str], start_date: datetime64, end_date: datetime64, time_diff_threshold: timedelta64, space_diff_threshold: timedelta64, orbit: Orbit, matchups: Dict[str, Dict[str, ndarray[tuple[Any, ...], dtype[_ScalarT]]]], check_before: bool | None = False, check_after: bool | None = False, has_land_ocean_mask: bool = False, reference_date: datetime64 = np.datetime64('1970-01-01T00:00:00'))[source]#

plot([projection])

Plot the matchup dataset generated from orbitx.interface.return_matchups

to_netcdf Exports a matchup object to a netcdf file
